description: Style NoteA compact adidas bag you'll love to carry around. It's stylish and feels featherlight - all the things a bag should be! Afraid you'll look like a geek lugging around a laptop? Not anymore! adidas' bag can hold your laptop comfortably and add a hint of sporty style!Product DetailsBlack upper with Adidas 3-Stripe on the frontA flap with Velcro closure to secure the main compartmentA zippered pocket on the flapA mesh pocket inside the flapOne main compartment with a separatorAn adjustable shoulder strap (made of fabric)Material and Care100% PESWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustSizeHeight: 42 cmWidth: 33 cmDepth: 9 cm
